text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Welcome home, Mom! I know how busy you are
with work, so thanks for making the time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How was your flight? Was there a lot turbulence?
Are you tired?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm positively bursting with energy! Now,
Scarlet, let's go for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can hardly believe you're the head of such
a major project, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're really incredible! Forging ahead and
taking the lead... It's just like when you used to
race!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My! Now that you mention it, I suppose not much
has changed. Speaking of which...

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're wearing that outfit again today. I have to
say, it really does suit you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, you picked it out for me. It's my favorite!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a mother should be familiar with what her
daughter likes.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hmm... This pasta is spicier than I anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, then I'll finish it for you! I actually love spic—

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
No, it's all right. I know you can't handle spicy
foods.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't you recall ordering spicy curry from that
restaurant when you were young? You started
crying because it made your tongue burn.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh...yeah... I remember that... I think.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My little Scarlet prefers something sweet. Oh, of
course! How about we get some shortcake?

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You always say you loved it because it was "the
number one sweetest thing in the world!" We
haven't much time left, so let's hurry!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Right! Thanks, Mom.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today, Mom! It's been so long since we
had a chance to chat, and you even bought me
cake.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was nothing. ...I'm sorry that I'm never able
to spend more time with you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I'm happy enough just having the
chance to see you. I'm already looking forward to
the next time you come home!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
About that... Things will likely become even more
hectic next month, so I've no idea when I'll be
back next.

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
We won't be able to see each other for a while, so
is there anything you need right now? Anything
troubling you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...No, I'm fine! There's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm giving my all in training, so you do your best,
too, Mom!

text_block_list.name: Scarlet's Mother
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for always supporting me, Scarlet.
Well then, bye-bye for now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's gone...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...How old was I when I last said that shortcake
was my number one favorite...?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...It's not a big deal, right? I don't want to burden
Mom when she's so busy...
I should hurry back and finish my homework.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Daiwa Scarlet by the academy gates. She
seems somewhat forlorn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Daiwa Scarlet by the academy gates. She
seems somewhat forlorn...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, no... This cake was a gift.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
O-of course not! Um, my Mom bought it for me!
I'm so thrilled that I just kind of zoned out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I need to get this to the fridge! I'll see
you later!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...! N-no, it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I saw my Mom today for the first
time in ages! We had lunch, and she even bought
me a gift!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I need to be sure to train hard so that I can keep
sending her good news!
